title: NYC Train, Air Travel Disrupted With City Bracing for Blizzard
description: If you’re trying to get into New York City on Monday, unless it’s essential, you’re probably better off hunkering down at home.
content: If you’re trying to get into New York City on Monday, unless it’s essential, you’re probably better off hunkering down at home.
